title: Review findings for wzcc (6f8a755f): roborev show 16 / one-shot fix with roborev fix 16
Enable bracketed paste mode for multi-line clipboard paste in input mode
description: When pasting multi-line text (e.g. yanked agent output) into input mode, each newline triggers Enter which immediately submits send_prompt(). Only the first line gets sent, rest is lost. Fix: enable crossterm EnableBracketedPaste and handle Event::Paste(String) to insert pasted text with literal newlines into the input buffer.
close_reason: Implemented bracketed paste: EnableBracketedPaste in terminal setup, Event::Paste handling in event loop, insert_str on InputBuffer

title: Add conversation history browsing to details panel (Epic)
description: Enable browsing past conversation turns (user prompt + assistant response pairs) in the TUI details panel. Currently only the last prompt/output is shown. This epic covers parsing transcript history, adding scroll navigation, and optimizing for large files.

title: Phase 1: MVP conversation history browsing
description:
Minimal viable implementation of conversation history browsing in the details panel.

Scope:
- Add ConversationTurn struct (user_prompt + assistant_response pair)
- Extend transcript parser to extract last N turn pairs from tail of JSONL
- Add history: Vec<ConversationTurn> field to ClaudeSession
- Add scroll state (selected turn index) to App struct
- Update render_details to display the selected conversation turn
- Bind Ctrl+J / Ctrl+K for history navigation (avoids j/k conflict with session list)
- Update footer to show history navigation keybindings when applicable

Out of scope: tool_use display, timestamps, lazy loading, focus mode
close_reason: Phase 1 MVP merged via PR #30

title: Phase 2: Improve history display quality
description:
Redesign history mode as two-level list→detail navigation (inspired by roborev TUI).

Current behavior (Phase 1): Shift+H enters directly into turn detail view, j/k switches turns.

New behavior:
1. Shift+H opens a history LIST view showing all conversation turns
   - Each row: turn number, relative timestamp, first line of user prompt (truncated)
   - j/k to navigate the list, Esc to exit back to normal mode
2. Enter on a list item opens the DETAIL view for that turn
   - Shows full user prompt + assistant response (existing render_history_details)
   - j/k to scroll within the turn, Ctrl+D/Ctrl+U for half-page scroll
   - Esc to go back to the list view

Implementation:
- Add HistoryViewMode enum: List | Detail
- Add history list rendering (reuse ratatui ListState pattern from session list)
- Show relative timestamp per turn (e.g. '5m ago') - requires parsing timestamp from transcript
- Refactor history key handlers for two-level state machine
- Update footer to reflect current history sub-mode

Out of scope: tool_use display, lazy loading, word-aware wrapping
close_reason: PR #31 merged to main

title: Phase 3: Large file optimization and live update handling
description:
Optimize for large transcript files and handle real-time updates gracefully.

Scope:
- Lazy loading: parse history on-demand from tail, load more as user scrolls up
- Scroll position preservation when transcript file is updated by file watcher
- Performance profiling and tuning for transcripts > 1MB
- Cache parsed conversation turns, invalidate on file change

Depends on: Phase 1 and Phase 2 completion

title: Review findings for wzcc (ea568778): roborev show 22 / one-shot fix with roborev fix 22
Review findings for wzcc (5dc82809): roborev show 5 / one-shot fix with roborev fix 5
description:
Review #5 findings for commit 5dc8280. Addressing:
1. (medium) Ctrl+D overscroll: history_scroll_offset grows unbounded internally, causing Ctrl+U to appear unresponsive. Fix by passing scroll_offset as &mut to render and writing back clamped value.
2. (low) G handler missing pending_g clear: g->G->g triggers gg. Add self.pending_g = false to G handler.
3. (low) Add truncation test for 5000-char limit in extract_conversation_turns.
close_reason: All 3 findings from Review #5 addressed in commit 4b64655

title: Fix u16 overflow in history scroll height calculation
description: render_history_details uses lines.len() as u16 which overflows at 65535 lines. Internal scroll calculations should use usize and clamp to u16 only at Paragraph::scroll boundary. Refs: src/ui/render.rs:699, src/ui/app.rs:87, src/ui/app.rs:918
close_reason: fixed in a0318dc
